metadata.description: Plugins shipped alongside clagentic-lite. Installs the five AI role agents (builder, reviewer, auditor, merge-gate, troubleshooter) and commentary skills (/infosec-rt, /eng-consult) globally so Claude Code discovers them in any enrolled project.

plugins.name: clagentic-lite
plugins.description: The five clagentic-lite role agents (builder, reviewer, auditor, merge-gate, troubleshooter) plus commentary skills (/infosec-rt, /eng-consult). Installed globally via clagentic-lite init.
